title: Add New Todo
user_story: As a user, I want to add new tasks to my list, so that I can keep track of what needs to be done.
acceptance_criteria: The web page displays an input field and a submit button for entering task details.
Entering text and submitting adds the task to the visible list immediately.
Submitting an empty input shows a validation message or is ignored.
Tasks are stored temporarily in memory during the current session.
